title: IMMZ.D2.DT.BCG ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D2.DT.BCG ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes

^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$.description: Display values for a specific code by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

csaimt5y-33.40.en: Client's age is more than 5 years

nbpsdwa-43.112.en: No BCG primary series dose was administered

csailtoet28d-45.40.en: Client's age is less than or equal to 28 days

cshsinou-42.29.en: Client's HIV status is negative or unknown

lvwaitlfw-52.92.en: Live vaccine was administered in the last four weeks

cicrat-52.25.en: Client is currently receiving antiretroviral therapy

cicnrat-56.26.en: Client is currently not receiving antiretroviral therapy

csaib28da5y-43.50.en: Client's age is between 28 days and 5 years

cstitrin-45.39.en: Client's TB infection test result is negative

nlvwaitlfw-55.92.en: No live vaccine was administered in the last four weeks

cstitriutndonry-77.34.en: Client's TB infection test result is unknown (test not done or no result yet)

cstitrip-45.39.en: Client's TB infection test result is positive

obpsdwa-44.112.en: One BCG primary series dose was administered

cidfbv-33.44.en: Client is due for BCG vaccination

cindfbv-37.48.en: Client is not due for BCG vaccination

cjirccn-53.66.en: Clinical judgement is required. Create clinical note.

cjirccn-53.67.en: Clinical judgement is required. Create clinical note.
